title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : campagne de vaccination contre la grippe
instructions: Lisez la note de service et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
To: All Staff
From: Human Resources
Subject: On-Site Flu Vaccination

As part of our annual health initiative, free flu vaccinations {{1}} be offered to all employees next week.

A nurse from Wellness Partners {{2}} be available in the main conference room from Tuesday to Thursday, between 10 a.m. and 3 p.m.

No appointment is necessary; employees can simply {{3}} by during their break.

{{4}}, please bring your employee ID card so we can update our records.

questions.explanation: L'action se déroule "next week" : futur passif, "will be offered".
Futur simple annonçant la disponibilité de l'infirmière la semaine suivante.
Après le modal "can", on utilise l'infinitif sans "to" : "can simply stop by".
On ajoute une instruction supplémentaire (apporter sa carte d'employé) : "Additionally".
